End of School Year Party
Unit 5 · Lesson 5 · pp.138–142
🎯 Objective: Talk about the end-of-year party using simple past (had, went, gave, got…) & match vowel sounds: /uː/ school·food · /iː/ meet·seat · /ʌ/ up·cut · /ɔː/ talk·door
🔊 Let's Pronounce — Match same vowel sounds (p.141):
/uː/: school = food · /iː/: meet = seat · /ʌ/: up = Cut · /ɔː/: talk = Door
